# Owner Housing

> Owner Housing is a property listing platform for India where buyers and renters can find verified properties directly from owners — no brokers, no commission. Browse apartments, houses, villas, plots, PG accommodations, and commercial spaces across Jorhat, Teok, Jorhat, Mariani, Jorhat, and more.

## About

Owner Housing connects property seekers directly with property owners across Assam. All listings are verified and posted by owners themselves. The platform covers both residential and commercial properties for sale and rent, with prices in Indian Rupees (INR) formatted in lakhs and crores.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://onrhosn-internal.web.app/): Browse all property listings with filters for buy/rent, price range, and sorting options
- [1 BHK Apartment in Lahdoigarh Chariali, Teok, Jorhat](https://onrhosn-internal.web.app/listing/1bhk-apartment-lahdoigarh-chariali-teok-jorhat): ₹7,000/mo, 700 sqft, For Rent
- [Commercial Shop Space in Lahdoigarh Chariali, Teok, Jorhat](https://onrhosn-internal.web.app/listing/commercial-shop-rent-lahdoigarh-chariali-teok-jorhat): ₹6,000/mo, 450 sqft, For Rent
- [Properties in Lahdoigarh Chariali, Teok — Shop, Rent, PG](https://onrhosn-internal.web.app/listing/multiple-properties-lahdoigarh-chariali-teok-jorhat): ₹7,000/mo, 800 sqft, For Rent
- [Properties in Deberapra Mariaini, Jorhat — Rent & Shop](https://onrhosn-internal.web.app/listing/multiple-properties-deberapra-mariaini-jorhat): ₹3,500/mo, 600 sqft, For Rent
- [Properties in Kolakhetra, Moubondha, Jorhat — Shop, Rent, PG](https://onrhosn-internal.web.app/listing/multiple-properties-kolakhetra-moubondha-jorhat): ₹8,000/mo, 1000 sqft, For Rent

## Property Types Available

- Apartments (1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK)
- Shops / Retail Spaces

## Cities Covered

Jorhat, Teok, Jorhat, Mariani, Jorhat

## Contact

All property owners can be contacted directly via phone or WhatsApp. No broker involvement, no commission charged.

For complete listing data, see [llms-full.txt](https://onrhosn-internal.web.app/llms-full.txt)
